title: Magic and rituals
description: Contains Iron's Spellbooks and Mahou Tsukai
body:
This modpack contains Iron's Spellbooks and Mahou Tsukai.

you play as a Mage and progress through different spell tiers, unlocking stronger spells as you go through your Johnny.

By progressing you can craft your own spells Scrolls and unlock insanely flashy abilities through Mahou Tsukai.

There's also a variety of bosses you can take on from Ultris: Boss Expansion, Irons Spellbooks, and more.
